title: Latency Ladder for Pragmatic Engineers
excerpt: A practical latency cheat sheet across caches, RTT, TCP/TLS handshakes, and LLM TTFT decomposition.

title: OSI Model for Pragmatic Engineers
excerpt: A practical OSI guide focused on debugging flow, fault isolation, and where latency hides in real systems.

title: Similarity Systems in Production: A Latency Playbook
excerpt: A pragmatic guide to autocorrect, typeahead, and web-crawl dedup through the lens of latency, memory, and implementation tradeoffs.

title: US West to US East RTT: The Number, The Floor, and the Lie
excerpt: A practical latency deep-dive: coast-to-coast RTT ranges, physics floors, handshake amplification, and how to budget for p95/p99 reality.

title: LLM Inference: From Zero to Modern
excerpt: A practical bottom-up guide to modern LLM serving: KV cache, continuous batching, PagedAttention, speculative decoding, and disaggregated prefill/decode.

title: Production LLM Streaming Architecture
excerpt: How to build resilient token streaming with SSE, Redis Streams, replayable offsets, and clean cancellation semantics.

title: Database Indexing: A Deep Dive
excerpt: Understanding how database indexes work and when to use them effectively.

title: Building Resilient Systems
excerpt: Strategies for designing systems that gracefully handle failures and recover quickly.

title: API Rate Limiting: Best Practices
excerpt: Implementing effective rate limiting strategies to protect your APIs from abuse.
